lead: What do you want to build toward? Pick one — habits do the rest.
titlePlaceholder: e.g. Lose weight for the wedding
deleteBody: Your activities stay — only this goal is removed.

focus.unavailable: This goal is no longer available.
focus.subA11y: {{done}} of {{planned}} done today. {{pct}} percent consistent this week.
focus.tileNewSubProject: A daily habit for this project
focus.tileNewSubGoal: Add a habit to this goal
focus.prepareWarA11y: Prepare your war strategy for this goal
focus.addPrepareA11y: Add a personal goal to prepare with
focus.prepHint: Personal goals that help you get ready. In Settings, choose whether they just remind you or also feed this goal's progress.
focus.emptyActivities: No activities on this journey yet. Tap the 🎙️ button to add your first.
focus.calHint: Tap a day to schedule these activities; ✓ marks days you completed them.

become.title: Who do you want to become?
become.subtitle: Pick an identity. Small daily reps turn it into who you are.
become.customPlaceholder: e.g. Become a calm, present parent
become.pickActivities: Swipe right to add, left to skip
become.firstVoteSub: Every rep is a vote for becoming {{title}}. Do one now.
become.firstVoteHint: Tap one to do it now
